subject: Jace, a blue-robed humanoid planeswalker with a hooded cloak, casting a mirror-image spell with both arms raised — a translucent duplicate of himself emerges from a burst of blue energy beside him
description: A hooded male spellcaster in a heavy blue cloak stands at center with both arms outstretched, palms glowing. A translucent doppelganger of him materializes from an explosion of pale blue energy and shattering shards of light to his right. Streaks of cyan magic and fragments of ice-like crystal radiate outward from the casting. The figure's posture is balanced and theatrical, with the secondary copy mirroring his stance in a more diffuse, ghostly form. Light source is the spell itself — cool rim light on the cloak's folds, pale highlights on the face. Background is an indistinct deep-blue void crossed by streaks of magical energy.
foreground: hooded spellcaster casting; translucent mirror-duplicate emerging beside him
background: abstract magical void with streaks of blue energy and shards of light
